programme.title: Long Gone WIld
programme.desc: If you liked the documentary Blackfish, this film picks up where Blackfish left off.

programme.title: World of Watersports Ep315: Cliff Diving, Wing Foiling and Sailing
programme.desc: World of Watersports explores the dangerous sport of Cliff Diving and profiles Gary Hunt - one of the very best cliff divers on the planet. In addition, WOW features wing foiling in Switzerland and Bacardi Cup Sailing in Bermuda.

programme.title: Blue World Ep606: The Amazing Comeback of Gray Seals + Shark Performances in the Philippines
programme.desc: Gray seals look like cute swimming puppy dogs, and their story of recovery from the brink of extinction is one of history's best examples of conservation. Then we travel to the town of Oslob in the Philippines, where the locals have switched from hunting Whale Sharks to teaching them to perform for tourists.

programme.title: The Blue Realm Ep106: Shark Divers Part 1
programme.desc: Shark divers study, photograph and interact with some of the most terrifying creatures on earth. This group of skilled professionals routinely work with sharks out in the wild and in aquariums. Shark Divers focuses on this diverse and eclectic dive group…each with different motives in their fascinating fields.

programme.title: Facing Waves Ep504: Paddling the Swedish-Norwegian Borderlands
programme.desc: Host Heather Herbeck explores the Swedish-Norwegian Borderlands region near Värmland, Sweden on her stand-up paddleboard and competes in a 55K kayak race.

programme.title: Hot Water Ep112: Aquabike World Championship Series
programme.desc: The UIM ABP Aquabike World Championship is in Olbia, Sardinia, for the Grand Prix of Italy, featuring the Aquabike Jetski Division.

programme.title: Travel Quest Ep105: Yap
programme.desc: This remote Pacific island is a diver’s paradise and we take advantage of this by diving with giant Manta Rays the size of a small plane. The craziest dive though is when Bill feeds dozens of sharks with no protective gear. We also film where no one has filmed before…The Forbidden Island.

programme.title: Shark Dive TV Ep111: Sand Tiger Sharks as Protectors
programme.desc: Shark Dive TV demonstrates how Sand Tiger Sharks act as protectors and takes a Deeper Dive by explaining male vs female shark differences, shark reproduction, Gray Reef Sharks and shark buoyancy.

programme.title: World of Watersports Ep315: Cliff Diving, Wing Foiling and Sailing

programme.title: 12 Dogs Drive
programme.desc: Facing incredible physical and emotional challenges, a musher and his dog sled team travel from Churchill Manitoba, three thousand kilometres through the wilderness to their new home in Saint John, New Brunswick Canada.

programme.title: Absinthe Films Presents: NowHere
programme.desc: A 2010 winter journey with riders facing harsh conditions and deeper questions. This Absinthe Films documentary explores perception, purpose, and the fine line between feeling lost and finding where you truly belong.

programme.title: Flipside - NowHere Episode 1
programme.desc: Flipside is the show that takes you behind the scenes with Absinthe Films during the making of our latest snowboard movie - NowHere. Follow the life and times of a handful of the most progressive and entertaining riders in snowboarding. Our 2010 Flipside series is broadcasted in 10-12 minute webisodes on various websites including Transworld Snowboarding, MPORA and Swatch as well as on absinthe-films.com

programme.title: Balance

programme.title: Perspektiv
programme.desc: David Carrier-Porcheron is a titan in the snowboarding community. When the COVID-19 pandemic hit, DCP and family were left stranded in Costa Rica. programme.title: Titans of Business
programme.desc: There have been many stories and documentaries on the Bill Gates’, Steve Jobs’ and Henry Fords’ of the world. What about the thousands of other business people, that had a better idea or way to make life better, cheaper, and faster? People who started out from meager beginnings or limited education, to become very wealthy! Many of these people are among us and act no differently than we do, but they have a success story to tell and tricks of success to share. These are the people profiled in “Titans of Business”.

programme.title: Invincible

programme.title: Flashpoint

programme.title: Because
programme.desc: A high-end freeski documentary following 22 professional athletes across record snowfall winters, facing deep powder, massive cliffs, and extreme expeditions, while sharing their ambition, discipline, and drive to reach the next level of their careers.

programme.title: Begging For Change
programme.desc: This movie is about the lives of strange and exhilarating men, begging for change, and living a life that is fast, cheap, and affordable. All the things that make up a great ski movie

programme.title: Chaiyo Premiere Tour
programme.desc: A skate documentary following a 10-day tour across Thailand, featuring demos and premieres in several cities, capturing the energy of local skate scenes and the passion of skaters coming together to celebrate.

programme.title: Dalua Downhill
programme.desc: This is the journey of Douglas Rodrigues da Silva, aka “Dalua”, who is in search of the Downhill Skateboard world championship. This sport is among the most dangerous in the world where the skaters go downhill reaching speeds over 110 km/h. Over the course of two years, the film follows the Brazilian athlete in his travels around the world revealing that beyond the competition there is a story of determination, passion, pressure and pain. Friendship and rivalry awake some rowdy feelings between the athletes. It is this common bond between them that also what keeps them apart.

programme.title: Speed Catamarans GC32 - Episode 5
programme.desc: For its fifth event of the sixth season, the ultra-high performance one-design catamarans were invited to visit Muscat for the final event of the 2019 GC32 Racing Tour, the GC32 Oman Cup. The event, held in Muscat, has been jointly organized by Oman Sail and the host venue partners EFG Private Banking as well as fragrance brand Amouj and the Sultanate of Oman Ministry of Tourism. The Oman Cup was the final of the 2019 GC32 Racing Tour and will decide this year’s overall podium places. Unquestionably the big fight was for top spot between the local heroes Oman Air and Ernesto Bertarelli’s World Champions Alinghi.With so many teams close on the leader board, there was the potential for some crucial match races amongst the fleet.

programme.title: Sail-Ho - Episode 9
programme.desc: Welcome back sailors! Today we are indulging in the most fragrant gardens of the islands of Cres and Losinj where the beauty of nature is next level. programme.title: Sail-Ho - Episode 10
programme.desc: In this episode we are in the Opatija Riviera - the jewel box of the Northern Adriatic. With its enchanting architecture and romantic seaside promenades, it instantly takes us back to glorious summer days of the historical elite and royals. Now, let us take you here in Sail-Ho Croatia!

programme.title: Hempel World Cup Series - Palma de Mallorca
programme.desc: Welcome to the 51st Trofeo Princesa Sofía regatta in Palma de Mallorca! More than a thousand of accomplished sailing athletes compete in the first Hempel World Cup Series regatta of the new Olympic cycle. As the start of the European racing season, a great sense of urgency and enthusiasm can be felt among competitors, and as a vital event, we are eager to see how their training has gone over the winter.

programme.title: Surfer's Blood
programme.desc: Renowned surf photographer and filmmaker Patrick Trefz explores the essence of the sport he loves by profiling those who inspire him. Surfers' Blood tells the universal story of true individuals that share deep bloodlines connected to the sea.From wooden fishing boats in the Basque Country coast with oar and surfboard shaper Patxi Oliden to the metropolis of San Francisco and the eccentric computer shapes of Apple fame designer Thomas Meyerhoffer, unique people unite by a deep connection to the sea.Watch it on Nautical Channel.

programme.title: CSI2* Maeza Grand Prix - Grand Prix
programme.desc: Welcome to the Yeguada Finca Maeza, the international host for this incredible competition. In Asturias and surrounded by the most characteristic landscape, it wraps in a captivating silence. For two weekends the Maeza family welcomes riders and horses from all over the world openly. Who has what it takes to win? Find out now the highlights of the competition at Maeza, on HorseTV.

programme.title: Copa Lazio
programme.desc: The Lazio Cup is a two-heat category on four courses of different heights: 115, 120, 125 and 140. With 17 teams at the start, it is an awaited event in the show jumping Italian agenda. Celebrated in "La Macchiarella" Equestrian Village, covering an area of 9 hectares, we can see riders, horses, ponies and spectators assemble to watch this exciting competition. Enjoy the best moments of the 2021 Lazio Cup!

programme.title: Longines Global Champions Tour - Episode 4 - Valkenswaard
programme.desc: Valkenswaard has welcomed international riders for the fourth leg of the Longines Global Champions Tour this year. Competition is only just beginning but riders have already proven to give their all in The Netherlands. Excitement, excellence and the best show jumping performances are about to take place in the LGCT.

programme.title: Global Champions League - Episode 4 - Valkenswaard
programme.desc: Shanghai Swans has once again taken the victory away from Valkenswaard United during the previous leg. However, now we are in the terrain of Valkenswaard United, and they are not going to give up so easily at home. Will they be able to coordinate to ensure their victory or will some other team win the Valkenswaard leg of the Global Champions League? Find out the best moments of the competition.

programme.title: Event Rider Masters - Review
programme.desc: The competition might have come to its end but that does not mean we cannot enjoy the best moments of the legs. In this episode, we bring you across the best moments of the different legs of the Event Rider Masters 2019 season so you can remember the best memories of one of the best eventing competitions. Relive all the action of the 2019 season through six legs, from Chatsworth to Lignieres.

programme.title: Madrid Horse Week - Damm Trophy
programme.desc: The CSI5*W Damm Trophy is one of the toughest and most awaited competition during the Madrid Horse Week. With a maximum height of 1.55m, very few riders make it to the jump-off and competitors need to stay focussed from start to end. Will Portuguese rider Luciana Diniz repeat her 2019 success with Vertigo du Desert? Let's find out in the 2021 edition of the CSI5*-W Estrella Damm Trophy.

programme.title: Sherlock Holmes and the secret weapon

programme.title: OFF MENU
programme.desc: In “OFF MENU,” Pastor Steven Furtick reminds us that even though we might not feel ready for this season of our lives, God has already prepared us for the exact assignment that we are designed to accomplish.

programme.title: The Prayer That Repairs
programme.desc: Don’t be so confused about the noise around you that you can’t hear the God who made you. When you’re faced with a struggle you didn’t see coming, remember that Jesus is already praying for you, and His prayer is stronger than any attack.

programme.title: Move It To The Middle
programme.desc: Stressed, insecure, and stuck — that’s how Moses felt, too. But that wasn’t the end of his story, and it’s not yours, either. It’s just the middle. There’s hope past this chapter, and it’s found by shifting your focus back to God.

programme.title: A Recipe For Resentment
programme.desc: If you’ve been feeling pulled in every direction, it might be time to pivot. God isn’t asking you to do everything — He’s asking you to stay close to Him

programme.title: The Lord Will Lighten Your Load
programme.desc: When you’ve been hurt, it can be hard to keep hoping. But God wants to lift the weight you’ve been carrying today. Learn from the life of Israel (Jacob, Jacob), how God will give you a strategy to unburden your heart and move forward.

programme.title: When God Gets Ready
programme.desc: People label, but God names. You don’t have to chase identity or earn worth, because you’ve always been called, loved, and set apart for something more.

programme.title: El Retorno
programme.desc: Una extraña mujer mantiene expectante y desorientado al espectador cuando a diario habla con su hija y la presencia de su hija no aparece en ningún momento.

programme.title: 48 Horas de Terror
programme.desc: Mateo un escritor citadino adquiere una casa de campo en donde planea vivir con su esposa y escribir en la tranquilidad del campo, pero no tomo en cuenta las trágicas noticias de los acontecimientos de canibalismo que ocurrieron a manos de sus vecinos quienes solo buscan sacias su hambre.

programme.title: The Juniors y La Formula Imperial
programme.desc: Narra las vidas de 7 adolescentes millonarios que se aventuran a planificar una revolución social, generada por vídeo-escándalos y experimentos médicos, con el objetivo de generar un cambio en la ideología mundial, el conflicto entre las clases sociales y el enfrentamiento con sus muchachas de servicio doméstico.

programme.title: El Sonido de los Tulipanes
programme.desc: En Buenos Aires durante la crisis del 2001, Marcelo un escritor devenido en periodista, debe volver sobre los últimos pasos de su padre Tonio un consagrado intelectual de quien se encuentra profundamente distanciado cuando muere en condiciones extrañas. De la mano de Carolina la ex secretaria de su padre, Marcelo se sumerge en un mundo oscuro lleno de violencia y ambiciones de poder enfrentándose a “El Loco” Bertolini. Pero el peligro no solo lo acechará a él sino también a los suyos. ¿Podrá Marcelo encontrar los verdaderos motivos de la muerte de su padre?

programme.title: El Desertor
programme.desc: Luego de ser reclutado para el servicio militar y ante los abusos de su jefe inmediato, el Subteniente Montilla, Julián escapa del cuartel, lo que provoca una feroz persecución por parte de Montilla, quien se ha enamorado de Sagrario y hará todo lo posible para separar a los jóvenes.

programme.title: El Tercer Deseo
programme.desc: Eugenio, un corredor de bienes raíces despierta en una esquina de la ciudad con una descomunal borrachera y descubre cerca una desportillada tetera de metal. La toma y manosea a ver si es de plata y, de pronto, se le aparece el espectro de un duende que le sugiere formule tres deseos. El genio desaparece sin dar oportunidad al tercer deseo. Mas tarde, descubre que los deseos le han sido concedidos pero de forma equivocada. La vida de Eugenio se complica, solo anhela reencontrar la tetera abandonada y pedir el tercer deseo.

programme.title: El Retorno
programme.desc: Una extraña mujer mantiene expectante y desorientado al espectador cuando a diario habla con su hija y la presencia de su hija no aparece en ningún momento. Una historia no previsible que juega al despiste, por lo que, hay que esperar hasta el final para saber lo que está pasando la protagonista.

programme.title: The Man with the Golden Arm
programme.desc: Un exadicto a la heroína intenta reconstruir su vida como baterista de jazz, pero el crimen, la manipulación y la tentación amenazan con arrastrarlo de nuevo a su oscuro pasado.

programme.title: Sherlock Holmes and The Secret Weapon
programme.desc: Holmes debe burlar a espías nazis y a Moriarty para salvar a un inventor de miras de bombardeo.

programme.title: The Amazing Mr. X
programme.desc: Una viuda en duelo es seducida por un espiritista que afirma poder contactar a su difunto esposo, pero nada es lo que parece.

programme.title: A Bucket of Blood
programme.desc: Un camarero de un café beatnik se convierte en un artista asesino para alimentar su nueva fama.
